## Tags
birdhouse, bird, garden, home, house, woodwork

## Categories
nature, animals, navigation, home

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/birdhouse)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Birdhouse;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Birdhouse { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
